warmUps.name: Movement Prep Circuit
warmUps.summary: Six-station circuit that systematically activates all major movement patterns with progressive intensity.

warmUps.name: Athletic Coordination Ladder
warmUps.summary: Ladder drills progressing from basic footwork → complex coordination patterns → sport-specific combos.

warmUps.name: Reactive Readiness Protocol
warmUps.summary: Primes the nervous system through progressive reactive drills — shuffles, drop-and-stick jumps, start/stop, accel/decel.

warmUps.name: Partner Medicine Ball Activation
warmUps.summary: Develops rotational power, core sequencing and full-body coordination through paired medicine ball work.

warmUps.name: Movement Quality Challenge
warmUps.summary: Gamified fundamental movement patterns with self-assessment, coach cues and partner feedback.
